title: Numismatic Lootbags
description: A datapack that uses Create: Numismatics coins in Resourceful Lootbags lootbags.
body:
**A datapack that uses Create: Numismatics coins in Resourceful Lootbags lootbags.**
# This datapack was designed for the following value weights for the lootbags:

Thrifty Lootbag: 4

Adorned Lootbag: 7

Posh Lootbag: 14

Luscious Lootbag: 29

Exotic Lootbag: 101

This datapack does not include a method for obtaining the lootbags in survival; it only adds the lootbags.
